_scope: ONLY class SubscriptionScreen + helper _BvumCard in lib/screens/settings/subscription_screens.dart. ComparePlansScreen/UsageScreen/BillingHistoryScreen/UpgradeScreen in the same file are owned by other agents and excluded here. No code changed; read-only extraction.

reads._source: repo.watchBusiness() -> Stream<BusinessProfile?> (lib/data/repos/app_repository.dart:23). Supplies the plan shown BEFORE a store entitlement goes active; once entitlement==active the billing.activePlanId wins (subscription_screens.dart:78-86).

fields.name: plan
fields._note: raw plan literal; passed through canonicalPlanId() -> one of starter|market|business|enterprise, unknown/absent fails CLOSED to starter (billing.dart:44-48, S-3). Server is sole entitlement authority per conventions; this profile field is display-only mirror.

reads._source: billing.entitlement (ValueNotifier<EntitlementState>) + billing.activePlanId (ValueNotifier<String>) from BillingService (lib/data/billing/billing_service.dart:49-54). Server-authoritative per conventions (Entitlements: server is the SOLE authority); as-built the client reflects it and _verifyWithBackend is a stub. Maps to the backend entitlement the store receipt verification returns.

fields.name: activePlanId
fields._note: canonical plan id; 'starter' when no paid entitlement. Used only when state==active (subscription_screens.dart:79-81).

fields.name: planId
fields._note: resolved canonical plan actually rendered = canonicalPlanId(active ? activePlanId : business.plan). starter|market|business|enterprise.

fields.name: renewal
fields._note: AS-BUILT MOCK: hardcoded 'per month · renews 1 Aug' / 'no renewal' for free plans (subscription_screens.dart:121-129). Backend owns real renewal date/status from the subscription.

reads._source: kPlans const catalog in lib/data/billing/billing.dart:151-195 (via kPlans.firstWhere on resolved planId, fail-closed to kPlans.first=Starter). Plan catalog; static in app today, candidate to be served by backend plan/pricing config.

fields.name: pricePerMonth
fields._note: as-built whole-naira (0=free, -1=off-store/enterprise). Per S-1 money is integer kobo on the wire — schema agent normalizes.

fields.name: productId
fields._note: store IAP product id; null for starter (free) and enterprise (off-store).

reads._source: _BvumCard (subscription_screens.dart:339-415) computes BVUM LIVE, client-side, via computeBvum() (billing.dart:118-125) over repo.watchAllDebts(). MAPS TO backend bvum-engine 30-day observation computation (conventions: BVUM, 30-day window, weights outstanding 40% + credit-issued-30d 30% + recovery 15% + active-debtors 10% + complexity 5%). Output is an upgrade RECOMMENDATION only, never an automatic plan change. NOTE as-built: computed on-device; complexity/active-debtor terms approximated (debtor term uses outstanding as naira proxy, complexity term 0 pre-staff).

fields.name: value
fields._note: computeBvum output in naira (S-1: kobo on wire).

fields.name: ceiling
fields._note: limitsFor(plan.id).bvumCeiling (PlanLimits.bvumCeiling, billing.dart:64-108): starter ₦2M · market ₦2M · business ₦20M · enterprise null=unlimited. null renders 'no ceiling'.

fields.name: recommendedPlan
fields._note: as-built implicit: nearCeiling (fraction>=0.8) triggers the upgrade nudge; the backend bvum-engine returns an explicit recommended plan id.

filtersOrSort: 30-day observation window: debts with createdAt after now-30d count toward creditIssued30d; recovered30d = sum(paidAmount); outstanding = sum(remaining), excluding deleted debts

reads._source: repo.watchAllDebts() -> Stream<List<DebtView>> (lib/data/repos/app_repository.dart:75). Read ONLY as the aggregation input to Bvum inside _BvumCard; never listed on this screen. DebtView fields used: debt.amount, remaining (getter), paidAmount, debt.createdAt, debt.deleted.
filtersOrSort: client-side aggregation only (sum of outstanding/credit30/recovered30); excludes deleted

reads._source: _usageSummary(planId) via _usedOf() (subscription_screens.dart:661-669). AS-BUILT MOCK: usage values read from shared_preferences keys 'usage.sends'/'usage.credits' with hardcoded fallback (cap*0.3, or 62 for fair-use) — NOT a real ledger. MAPS TO the backend allowance ledger (SMS/WhatsApp delivery sends) and AI credit ledger (conventions: Metering). Caps come from limitsFor(planId).

fields.name: sendsUsed
fields._note: mocked; real value = messaging allowance consumed this period

fields.name: aiCreditsUsed
fields._note: mocked; real value = AI credits ledger consumed this period

filtersOrSort: scoped to current billing period / current plan caps

authContext._note: Billing/subscription is owner-only per conventions (staff cannot touch billing/subscription). Navigation-only CTAs on this screen (Upgrade -> /compare, Usage, Billing history) and billing.restorePurchases (IAP restore) are not backend actions; real purchase/entitlement actions live on the sibling screens owned by other agents.

special._note: StreamBuilders are local drift streams, not server push. Entitlement/activePlanId are ValueNotifiers reflecting server entitlement (reflected, not streamed).

uiStatesHandled: bvum-no-ceiling (enterprise: unlimited scale, no meter ceiling)
